## Pull Request Description

**What does this PR do?**
...

**Type of change:**
- [ ] App submission (adding to `registry.json`)
- [ ] Frontend bug fix
- [ ] Frontend feature / improvement
- [ ] Documentation

**For app submissions, confirm:**
- [ ] Added exactly one entry to `registry.json` (not a new folder or file)
- [ ] `bundleUrl` points to a live `.cjs` on a public CDN
- [ ] `repo` is a public GitHub repo
- [ ] App works in WebContainers (no native C++ modules)
- [ ] App is open-source

**Links:**
- Repo:
- Bundle URL:
